## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Test or CI update

## Validation

List how this was tested (commands, screenshots, or steps).

## Team Workflow Checklist

- [ ] I am not opening this PR from `main`
- [ ] I pulled latest `main` and synced my branch before this PR
- [ ] My commits are small and use clear messages
- [ ] I resolved merge conflicts (if any) and verified behavior after resolution
- [ ] I kept this PR focused and excluded unrelated changes
